target: WIN-020 detail_verdict_text — neutralize the surviving advocate-mode defense (rating 3/5) that judging a young geometric framework against LLR millimeter precision violates the review's own “no default favoritism” principle. Anchor the trivial-transcription verdict explicitly to the dome author's own CONFIRMED label (not a maturity bar we chose), and add an explicit preliminary-result carve-out that shows the defense does not rescue the claim even under a younger-model charitable reading.

defense_being_neutralized.summary_from_curmudgeon: The dome model's “epicyclic gears” language is a placeholder for a mechanism that any cosmology must eventually supply; judging a young geometric framework against LLR millimeter precision — developed over 275 years of standard-physics refinement — violates this review's own “no default favoritism” principle. At worst WIN-020 is an open item for the dome, not a disproof. The dome's contribution is precisely the geometric reframing, and dismissing it before a dome-community effort can produce gear ratios is the same bar we reject for the standard model.
defense_being_neutralized.analyst_reassessment: The defense is real rhetoric but not real physics. It dissolves the moment the critique is explicitly anchored to the dome author's own status taxonomy: WIN-020 is labelled CONFIRMED on the dome site, not pending, not open, not preliminary. The author has declined the charitable label the defender now wants to impose retroactively. Even granting a preliminary-result carve-out, the substantive burden is unchanged (gear teeth, driver, rate profile, amplitude prediction) and the dome supplies none of it. Rated 1/5 after this expansion lands.

current_detail_verdict_text: Gravitational torque produces exact period; gears have no physical driver. Independent of the scientific critique above, this claim also fails our post-hoc test on structural grounds. The numerical value is textbook physics (Part 3.1b, "trivial-transcription test"): it appears in undergraduate references and widely indexed resources, so there is no meaningful sense in which the dome monitor script "predicted" it before reading the data. Under the dome author's own definition ("prediction was timestamped before confirming data was pulled"), for WIN-020 the weaker timestamp test is inapplicable in the opposite direction — there is no monitor.py handler, no hardcoded expected value, and no live fetch; the period appears only as a metadata label. No legitimate-novelty carve-out applies: the value is not obscure and the derivation (where one is offered at all) is algebraically equivalent to a standard-model derivation. See Part 3.1b.
replacement_html: Gravitational torque produces exact period; gears have no physical driver. Independent of the scientific critique above, this claim also fails our post-hoc test on structural grounds. The numerical value is textbook physics (Part 3.1b, "trivial-transcription test"): it appears in undergraduate references and widely indexed resources, so there is no meaningful sense in which the dome monitor script "predicted" it before reading the data. Under the dome author's own definition ("prediction was timestamped before confirming data was pulled"), for WIN-020 the weaker timestamp test is inapplicable in the opposite direction — there is no monitor.py handler, no hardcoded expected value, and no live fetch; the period appears only as a metadata label. No legitimate-novelty carve-out applies: the value is not obscure and no dome-specific derivation is offered at all. This verdict is returned against the dome author's own stated bar, not a maturity standard we have chosen. The dome promotes WIN-020 to CONFIRMED, not to a “pending-refinement,” “preliminary-result,” or “open-for-gear-ratio-derivation” label. A younger-model carve-out would not rescue the claim in any case: a preliminary-result label would at most move the burden onto producing gear tooth counts, a driver, a rate-versus-time profile, and a prediction for the ±5° declination-extreme swing the cycle modulates — none of which the dome supplies. Lunar laser ranging confirms the gravitational-torque account to millimeter precision; the dome's gear metaphor produces no rate, no amplitude, and no testable deviation at any precision at all. See Part 3.1b.
holes_addressed: advocate-mode defense (rating 3/5): “standard-model maturity bar” — neutralized by anchoring to the dome author's own CONFIRMED label rather than an externally imposed maturity standard, and by showing the defense fails even under a charitable preliminary-result reframe

minor hole #3 (curmudgeon Cycle 3): the “(where one is offered at all)” hedge is gratuitous for WIN-020 since no dome-specific derivation is offered — replaced with “no dome-specific derivation is offered at all,” reserving the hedge wording for WINs that do offer a derivation
holes_not_addressed_here: moderate hole (Saros/nodal conflation in detail_evidence): field is detail_evidence, not detail_verdict_text — leave for a separate detail_evidence patch or the decider to pick up from ISS-1135 directly; no functional dependency on this expansion
minor hole #4 (finding one-liner could add inclination 5.145° and ±5° declination-extreme specifics): optional polish on the finding field, not the verdict field — out of scope for this expansion
new_evidence_added: Explicit reference to the dome's own status taxonomy (CONFIRMED vs. pending/preliminary/open) as the bar against which WIN-020 is judged

Enumeration of the substantive dome-side deliverables (gear tooth counts, driver, rate-versus-time profile, ±5° declination-extreme swing amplitude) that a “preliminary-result” carve-out would still require

Lunar laser ranging (LLR) millimeter-precision framing — produces a concrete bar for the dome's gear metaphor to clear (any rate at any precision), showing the gap is structural, not merely a maturity difference

anticipated_objections.objection: You are holding the dome to LLR millimeter precision; that is exactly the maturity bar the defender objects to.
anticipated_objections.response: We are not. We explicitly note that a preliminary-result label would shift the burden to producing any rate, any amplitude, and any testable deviation at any precision at all — orders of magnitude easier than mm-precision. The dome still supplies none. The LLR reference stands only as the upper end of the standard-model account, to show the gap is structural, not cosmetic.

anticipated_objections.objection: The dome author cannot retroactively relabel WIN-020 as ‘pending’ now — but your critique assumes the label is permanent and punishes him for a choice he might revisit.
anticipated_objections.response: We preserve that option explicitly. The verdict is anchored to the current CONFIRMED label; if the author demotes WIN-020 to a preliminary-result or open status (as he did two kill-shots on 2026-04-17), the Part 3.1b trivial-transcription test would no longer apply in the same form, and the claim would migrate from the “post-hoc CONFIRMED” critique to the “open mechanism” bucket. The preliminary-result carve-out we describe is precisely the off-ramp.

anticipated_objections.objection: You say ‘no dome-specific derivation is offered at all,’ but Antikythera is a derivation — from gear tooth counts to the cycle.
anticipated_objections.response: The Antikythera’s ratios are derivations because the tooth counts are specified and physically realized. The dome names the mechanism ‘epicyclic gears’ without supplying tooth counts, a driver, or a rate. Naming the mechanism is not deriving from it — which is the point the kernel-of-truth framing makes in the detail_evidence already.

anticipated_objections.objection: Calling out the author's CONFIRMED label is ad hominem — you are attacking the labelling choice rather than the physics.
anticipated_objections.response: It is a posture-check, not ad hominem. The dome's own auditing language (‘prediction was timestamped before confirming data was pulled,’ ‘Falsification Rule,’ ‘CONFIRMED’) is the methodological vocabulary we are asked to engage with. Taking the author at his word on labels is the charitable reading, not the uncharitable one.

kernel_of_truth: The defender's charity request is genuinely warranted for any framework in active development — mature theories earned their precision over centuries. The honest move is to credit the dome for being young, then show the critique is not a maturity bar imposed from outside but an application of the author's own stated status taxonomy. The dome author chose CONFIRMED; we are taking him at his word.
cross_references: Part 3.1b — post-hoc / trivial-transcription test (referenced directly in replacement text)

HNOTE-KILLSHOT-STATUS-DEMOTION-001 — precedent for the dome author demoting CONFIRMED labels when the substance warrants it (Sydney-Perth, Polaris on 2026-04-17); strengthens the claim that CONFIRMED is the author's active choice, not a frozen historical artifact

EXP-185 (WIN-019 defense neutralization) — parallel Mode 3 structure: quantify what the dome commits to by its own quoted precision / label, then show the defense does not rescue the claim at that self-chosen bar
WIN-021, WIN-022, WIN-037 — cross-WIN consistency (also textbook values, no dome derivation; verdict pattern compatible per curmudgeon Lens B)
notes: Mode 3 defense neutralization for advocate-mode rating 3/5. The patch is a targeted replacement of the detail_verdict_text field only; detail_evidence and the finding one-liner are untouched here (see holes_not_addressed_here). The expansion also opportunistically fixes minor hole #3 from the same curmudgeon review (the “where one is offered at all” hedge was gratuitous for WIN-020). Verdict label remains ‘Std Model Explains’. After integration, defense rating should drop from 3/5 to 1/5 because the new text anchors to the author's own taxonomy and preempts the ‘give the young model time’ rebuttal.
